home.benefit2: Enhances natural radiance with botanical light-reflecting particles

home.brandStory1: At Shan Loray, we believe true luxury lies in the marriage of cutting-edge biotechnology and timeless botanical wisdom.
home.brandStory2: Our ingredients are sourced from pristine environments around the world, carefully selected for their potency and ethical cultivation.
home.brandStory3: This dedication to excellence has made us the choice of discerning individuals who refuse to compromise on quality or integrity.
home.testimonial1: Shan Loray represents the perfect balance of luxury and efficacy. Every product feels like an indulgent ritual.
home.testimonial2: The transformative power of these serums is undeniable. My complexion has never been more luminous and radiant.
home.testimonial3: From the elegant packaging to the exquisite formulations, everything about this brand speaks to quality and care.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.subtitle: Your privacy is important to us. This policy explains how Shan Loray collects, uses, and protects your personal information.

paragraph1.part2: , we are committed to protecting your privacy and handling your personal data with transparency and care. This Privacy Policy describes our practices for collecting, using, and safeguarding the information you share with us when using our website and services.

intro.paragraph2: By using our services, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this policy. If you do not agree, please discontinue use of our services.

content.subtitle: Personal Information
content.text: When you create an account or make a purchase, we collect information such as your name, email address, phone number, and shipping address. This information is necessary to process your orders and provide our services.

content.subtitle: Skin Analysis Data
content.text: When you use our AI Skin Analysis feature, we collect your skin profile data including skin type, concerns, and analysis results. This data is used solely to provide personalized product recommendations and track your skin journey over time.

content.subtitle: Usage Data
content.text: We automatically collect certain information when you visit our website, including your IP address, browser type, pages visited, and time spent on pages. This helps us improve our services and user experience.

content.subtitle: Payment Information
content.text: Payment details are processed securely through our payment providers. We do not store your full credit card numbers — only the last four digits and card type for your reference.

content.subtitle: Order Processing
content.text: We use your personal information to process and fulfill your orders, send order confirmations, and provide shipping updates.

content.subtitle: Personalization
content.text: Your skin analysis data and purchase history allow us to offer personalized product recommendations, beauty routines, and tailored content that matches your unique needs.

content.subtitle: Communication
content.text: We may send you emails about your orders, account activity, and promotional offers. You can opt out of marketing emails at any time while still receiving transactional messages.

content.subtitle: Service Improvement
content.text: We analyze usage patterns and feedback to improve our website, products, and services. All data used for this purpose is aggregated and anonymized.

content.subtitle: Encryption
content.text: All data transmitted between your browser and our servers is encrypted using industry-standard SSL/TLS protocols. Sensitive information is stored using advanced encryption methods.

content.subtitle: Access Controls
content.text: Access to your personal data is strictly limited to authorized personnel who need it to provide our services. All staff with data access are bound by confidentiality agreements.

content.subtitle: Data Retention
content.text: We retain your personal information for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide services. You may request deletion of your account and associated data at any time.

content.subtitle: Breach Notification
content.text: In the unlikely event of a data breach that affects your personal information, we will notify you promptly in accordance with applicable laws and regulations.

content.subtitle: Third-Party Service Providers
content.text: We share necessary data with trusted partners who help us operate our business, including payment processors, shipping carriers, and analytics providers. These partners are bound by strict data protection agreements.

content.subtitle: No Data Selling
content.text: We never sell, rent, or trade your personal information to third parties for their marketing purposes. Your data is used only to provide and improve our services to you.

content.subtitle: Legal Requirements
content.text: We may disclose your information if required by law, court order, or government regulation, or if we believe disclosure is necessary to protect our rights or the safety of others.

content.subtitle: Access & Correction
content.text: You have the right to access, update, or correct your personal information at any time through your account settings or by contacting our support team.

content.subtitle: Data Deletion
content.text: You may request the deletion of your account and personal data. Please note that some information may be retained for legal or legitimate business purposes.

content.subtitle: Marketing Opt-Out
content.text: You can unsubscribe from marketing communications at any time by clicking the unsubscribe link in any email or updating your notification preferences in your account settings.

content.subtitle: Cookie Preferences
content.text: You can control cookie settings through your browser preferences. Note that disabling certain cookies may affect the functionality of our website.

content.subtitle: Essential Cookies
content.text: We use essential cookies to enable core functionality such as authentication, shopping cart, and security features. These cannot be disabled as the site would not function without them.

content.subtitle: Analytics Cookies
content.text: With your consent, we use analytics cookies to understand how visitors interact with our website, helping us improve the user experience and content.

content.subtitle: Preference Cookies
content.text: These cookies remember your settings and preferences, such as your language and region, to provide a more personalized experience on return visits.

contact.title: Questions About Your Privacy?
contact.description: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or how we handle your data, please don't hesitate to contact us.

termsConditions.title: Terms & Conditions
termsConditions.subtitle: Please read these terms carefully before using our services or making a purchase on the Shan Loray website.

intro.part2: . These Terms & Conditions govern your use of our website and the purchase of products from us. By placing an order, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these terms.
intro.part3: If you have any questions about these terms, please contact our customer support team before making a purchase.

footer.title: Need Clarification?
footer.desc: If you have any questions about our Terms & Conditions, our team is happy to help.

content.subtitle: Agreement to Terms
content.text: By accessing or using the Shan Loray website and services, you agree to be bound by these Terms & Conditions. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our services.

content.subtitle: Changes to Terms
content.text: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. We will notify users of significant changes via email or a prominent notice on our website. Continued use of our services after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

content.subtitle: Eligibility
content.text: You must be at least 18 years of age to use our services and make purchases. By using our website, you represent and warrant that you meet this requirement.

content.subtitle: Order Acceptance
content.text: All orders are subject to availability and acceptance. We reserve the right to refuse or cancel any order at our discretion, including orders that appear to be placed by resellers or distributors.

content.subtitle: Pricing
content.text: All prices are listed in USD and are subject to change without notice. We make every effort to ensure accurate pricing, but in the event of an error, we reserve the right to cancel the order or contact you to arrange a corrected order.

content.subtitle: Payment
content.text: Payment is required at the time of purchase. We accept major credit and debit cards. All transactions are processed securely through our payment providers.

content.subtitle: Order Confirmation
content.text: After placing an order, you will receive an email confirmation with your order details. This confirmation does not constitute acceptance of your order — acceptance occurs when your order is dispatched.

content.subtitle: Delivery Times
content.text: Estimated delivery times are provided for guidance only and are not guaranteed. We are not responsible for delays caused by customs, postal services, or other factors beyond our control.

content.subtitle: Shipping Costs
content.text: Shipping costs are calculated at checkout based on your location and chosen delivery method. Free shipping thresholds may apply and are subject to change.

content.subtitle: Risk of Loss
content.text: Title and risk of loss for products pass to you upon delivery to the shipping carrier. We are not responsible for lost or stolen packages after they have been delivered.

content.subtitle: Return Policy
content.text: We accept returns of unopened, unused products in their original packaging within 30 days of delivery. Products that have been opened cannot be returned for hygiene reasons.

content.subtitle: Refund Process
content.text: Approved refunds will be processed to your original payment method within 5-7 business days of receiving the returned item. Shipping costs are non-refundable unless the return is due to our error.

content.subtitle: Defective Products
content.text: If you receive a defective or damaged product, please contact us within 7 days of delivery. We will arrange a replacement or full refund at no additional cost to you.

content.subtitle: Ownership
content.text: All content on the Shan Loray website, including text, images, logos, and product descriptions, is owned by or licensed to Shan Loray and is protected by copyright and intellectual property laws.

content.subtitle: Permitted Use
content.text: You may view and download content from our website for personal, non-commercial use only. Any other use, including reproduction, distribution, or modification, requires our prior written consent.

content.subtitle: User Content
content.text: By submitting reviews, photos, or other content to our website, you grant Shan Loray a non-exclusive, royalty-free license to use, display, and distribute such content in connection with our services.

content.subtitle: Disclaimer
content.text: Our products and services are provided "as is" without warranties of any kind, either express or implied. We do not warrant that our website will be error-free or uninterrupted.

content.subtitle: Limitation
content.text: To the fullest extent permitted by law, Shan Loray shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of our products or services.

content.subtitle: Governing Law
content.text: These Terms & Conditions are governed by and construed in accordance with applicable laws. Any disputes arising under these terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the competent courts.

content.subtitle: Secure Payments
content.text: All payment information is encrypted and processed securely. We do not store your full payment card details on our servers.

content.subtitle: Loyalty Points
content.text: Loyalty points are awarded on qualifying purchases and may be redeemed for discounts on future orders. Points have no cash value and cannot be transferred. We reserve the right to modify or discontinue the loyalty program at any time.

content.subtitle: Promotional Offers
content.text: Promotional discounts and offers are subject to their own terms and conditions. They cannot be combined with other offers unless explicitly stated and are valid for a limited time only.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about our products and services
faq.supportAvailability: Our support team is available Monday to Friday, 9am - 6pm EST

deliveryTime.a: Standard delivery takes 5-7 business days. Express delivery takes 2-3 business days. Same-day delivery is available for orders placed before 12pm.

trackOrder.q: How can I track my order?
trackOrder.a: Once your order ships, you will receive a tracking number via email. You can also track your order in your account dashboard under Order Tracking.

shippingCosts.a: Standard shipping is free on orders over $75. Express shipping is $15. Same-day delivery is $25. International shipping rates vary by destination.

internationalShipping.a: Yes, we ship to over 50 countries worldwide. International orders typically take 10-14 business days and may be subject to customs duties.

returnPolicy.a: We accept returns of unopened, unused products within 30 days of delivery. Products must be in their original packaging.

refundTime.q: How long does a refund take?
refundTime.a: Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days after we receive your returned item. The amount will be credited to your original payment method.

exchangeProduct.a: Yes, we offer exchanges for unopened products within 30 days. Please contact our support team to initiate an exchange.

nonReturnable.a: Opened or used products cannot be returned for hygiene reasons. Gift cards and promotional items are also non-returnable.

paymentMethods.q: What payment methods do you accept?
paymentMethods.a: We accept all major credit and debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, Amex), PayPal, and Apple Pay.

paymentSecurity.a: Yes, all payments are processed through PCI-compliant payment processors. We never store your full card details on our servers.

installments.a: Yes, we offer installment payment options through our payment partners. Select the installment option at checkout.

multiplePayments.q: Can I use multiple payment methods?
multiplePayments.a: Currently we support one payment method per order. However, you can use loyalty points in combination with a payment method.

changeAddress.q: Can I change my delivery address after ordering?
changeAddress.a: Address changes are possible within 1 hour of placing your order. Please contact our support team immediately.

poBox.q: Do you deliver to PO Boxes?
poBox.a: We can deliver to PO Boxes for standard shipping. Express and same-day delivery require a physical address.

notHome.q: What happens if I am not home for delivery?
notHome.a: The courier will leave a delivery notice. You can reschedule delivery or collect from a local depot.

findProducts.q: How do I find the right products for my skin?
findProducts.a: Use our AI Skin Analysis tool to get personalized product recommendations based on your unique skin profile.

naturalIngredients.q: Are your products made with natural ingredients?
naturalIngredients.a: Our products combine the best of nature and science. We use high-quality botanical ingredients enhanced with cutting-edge biotechnology.

crueltyFree.a: Yes, all Shan Loray products are 100% cruelty-free. We never test on animals and are certified by leading cruelty-free organizations.

storeProducts.q: Can I find your products in stores?
storeProducts.a: Currently, Shan Loray products are available exclusively online to ensure freshness and authenticity.

updateAccount.q: How do I update my account information?
updateAccount.a: You can update your account information in your profile settings. Go to Account Dashboard and click on Edit Profile.

loyaltyProgram.q: How does the loyalty program work?
loyaltyProgram.a: Earn 1 point for every $1 spent. Points can be redeemed for discounts on future purchases. Reach 2,000 points for Elite status and 3,000 for Gold status.

forgotPassword.q: I forgot my password. What should I do?
forgotPassword.a: Click the Forgot Password link on the login page. We will send a password reset link to your registered email address.

multipleAddresses.q: Can I save multiple shipping addresses?
multipleAddresses.a: Yes, you can save multiple shipping addresses in your account. Set one as your default address for faster checkout.

skinAnalysis.heroSubtitle: Advanced AI technology analyzes your skin in seconds with medical-grade precision
skinAnalysis.bannerDesc: Our AI-powered skin analysis uses medical-grade technology to deliver personalized results in seconds. Learn how our consultation process works before you begin.

skinAnalysis.journeySubtitle: Monitor improvements with regular skin analysis

skinAnalysis.faq1q: How accurate is the AI skin analysis?
skinAnalysis.faq1a: Our AI technology analyzes skin with 98% accuracy, validated by dermatologists and based on millions of skin scans.
skinAnalysis.faq2q: How often should I get analyzed?
skinAnalysis.faq2a: We recommend monthly analysis to track improvements and adjust your skincare routine as needed.
skinAnalysis.faq3q: Is my data private and secure?
skinAnalysis.faq3a: Absolutely. All images and data are encrypted and never shared with third parties. Your privacy is our priority.
skinAnalysis.faq4a: The basic analysis is complimentary. Premium features include expert consultations and advanced tracking.
skinAnalysis.faq5q: Can I use recommended products from other brands?
skinAnalysis.faq5a: While we recommend our scientifically formulated products, the analysis results can guide any skincare choice.
skinAnalysis.faq6q: How long until I see results?
skinAnalysis.faq6a: Most users notice improvements within 4-6 weeks of following their personalized routine consistently.
